lede_today: Re-read how your body feels before each task — not just once a day. A hard day has two pieces, and you can be fresh for the first but cooked for the second. The console weighs recovery, finger condition, schedule slot, and skin/CNS state and tells you whether to run your next task or back off.
lede_week: Three genuinely hard days — Mon, Wed, Sat. Tue/Thu/Fri are productive but low-CNS, hitting grip types and tissue that don't fight the hard days for recovery. Tick a day when it's done; your week progress and history update automatically.
lede_exercises: Every prescription with its full spec, what it actually trains, and tap-to-swap alternates that hit the same adaptation. Swapped picks are remembered and feed back into your week view. Filter by what you're training.
lede_metrics: The numbers that actually move at your level. Max finger force is near its ceiling for you — so we track rate of force development, contact strength, critical force, pinch, and pull. Log a value after a test; the sparkline shows your trend.
lede_log: Everything you've logged — recommended sessions, completed days, and test results — newest first.
footer_text: Built from: Eva López-Rivera (MAW/MED), Tyler Nelson / Camp4 (recruitment pulls, density hangs, wrist), Keith Baar (collagen loading), Eric Hörst & Lattice (frequency & periodization), Ferrer-Uris 2023 (sloper activation). Calibrated to advanced finger/pull strength — connective tissue is the assumed bottleneck. Not medical advice. Stop on any sharp or lingering finger pain.
log_empty: No sessions logged yet. Run the day recommender, tick a day, or log a marker test — it'll show up here.
reset_confirm: Reset all saved progress, swaps, metrics and logs? This cannot be undone.
td_applies: This read is for your next task:
td_all_done: All tasks done for today — recover.
login_subtitle: Sign in to your training console
